Container.Name: telegram-archive
Container.Overview: Automated Telegram backup service that periodically archives messages and media from your chats, groups, and channels. Uses Telethon for scheduled exports with optional real-time message listening. Supports SQLite or PostgreSQL, media deduplication, and configurable retention. [br][br] This is the backup container. For browsing archived messages, install the [b]Telegram Archive Viewer[/b] container separately. [br][br] [b]Requires Telegram API credentials[/b] from https://my.telegram.org [br][br] More info: https://github.com/GeiserX/Telegram-Archive
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: telegram backup chat messages media archive export

Config.Name: Schedule
Config.Description: Cron schedule for backups (default: every 6 hours)

Config.Name: Max Media Size (MB)
Config.Description: Maximum media file size to download in MB

Config.Name: Enable Listener
Config.Description: Enable real-time message listening between scheduled backups

Config.Name: Chat IDs
Config.Description: Comma-separated chat IDs to back up (empty = all chats)

Config.Name: Chat Types
Config.Description: Types of chats to back up
